Name: Use DIVIDE() instead of the '/' operator
Description: Generic, advisory best-practice only -- NOT a Tower BI contract/approval/business-truth verdict. DIVIDE() handles divide-by-zero/blank safely; a bare '/' can error or return Infinity. (This mirrors the home-grown D4 rule; here it proves the repo-controlled BPA ruleset mechanism, not a replacement for Tower BI's own DAX governance.)
